backend/main.mo: Motoko actor exposing deduplicateComicText that removes duplicate text lines using a Set and traps on empty input.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report listing implemented features, associated files, components, and test IDs for narration, voice styles, and character metadata updates.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Reference file containing prewritten summaries of numerous frontend files for build and planning use.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global styles defining theme variables and dark mode overrides for the app’s color system.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point loading the React app via main.tsx and setting the page title.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component composing theme, settings, narration/listening controls, transcript panel, deduplication toggle, comic viewer, and PDF export.
frontend/src/components/ComicPanel.tsx: Wrapper component providing comic-style panel layout with variant-based background styling.
frontend/src/components/ComicParts.tsx: Presentational components implementing caption boxes, speech/thought bubbles, SFX text, and scene labels.
frontend/src/components/ComicViewer.tsx: Renders story and credits panels with optional deduplication, overlayed bubbles, and panel/line statistics.
Button component that triggers PDF export via exportComicToPDF and shows loading and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer displaying copyright, attribution links, and creator credits with dynamic year and tracking URL.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders the main header with title and a button to toggle light and dark themes.
frontend/src/components/RepetitionRemova: Provides a switch to enable or disable automatic removal of repeated comic text lines.
frontend/src/components/StoryListeningCo: Controls speech recognition, updating transcripts and handling microphone start/stop and errors.
frontend/src/components/StoryNarrationCo: Manages text-to-speech narration with voice selection, playback controls, and script generation based on settings.
Displays the captured transcript with word count and provides copy and clear actions.
frontend/src/contexts/ComicSettingsConte: Context provider storing the repetition-removal setting and exposing setters.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor, refreshing dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Handles Internet Identity login state, persistence, and access through a React context provider.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exposes a mutation that calls the backend to deduplicate comic text and invalidates related queries.
Implements speech recognition with live transcripts, interim text, error handling, and start/stop controls.
frontend/src/hooks/useSpeechSynthesisVoi: Loads and tracks browser speech synthesis voices, updating when voiceschange fires.
frontend/src/hooks/useStoryNarration.ts: Manages text‑to‑speech narration for comic scripts with voice selection, playback control, and error handling.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind-based global styles defining comic-themed colors, typography, and UI components.
frontend/src/lib/comicData.ts: Contains structured Spider-Verse comic panel data with text parts and optional illustrations.
frontend/src/lib/comicModel.ts: Defines types for comic panels and parts plus helpers to extract text lines.
frontend/src/lib/deduplication.ts: Provides functions to deduplicate text lines and panel parts and count total text lines.
frontend/src/lib/narration.ts: Builds narration scripts from comic panels, converting parts to speakable text with optional deduplication.
frontend/src/lib/pdfExport.ts: Generates printable HTML and triggers browser print to export deduplicated comic panels as PDF.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility for merging class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point mounting React with query client and identity provider.
frontend/src/types/web-speech.d.ts: Provides TypeScript ambient definitions for the Web Speech API, covering recognition events, results, errors, and constructors.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom fonts, colors, shadows, container settings, and plugin integrations.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata, existing features, and pending requests related to narration, voice styles, and character description updates.
